title: Password protection sharable links & restricted embedding of boards
excerpt:
Hi everyone, 
Vimeo gives users the option to password protect videos and restrict embedding outside of whitelisted domains. I would love to have similar options for shared boards on Monday.com. 
VIMEO

posts.author: Iskandar (iskandar@bwefardeboer.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

Vimeo gives users the option to password protect videos and restrict embedding outside of whitelisted domains. I would love to have similar options for shared boards on Monday.com.
